title: Karnataka High Court sets aside trial court order to grant home cooked meals to Renukaswamy murder accused in jail
description: The Karnataka High Court recently set aside trial court's permission to provide home-cooked meal once a week to Renukaswamy murder case accused Pavithra Gowda and others. [The State of Karnataka v Pavithra Gowda & Ors]Justice M Nagaprasanna observed the trial court's order was not in accordance with the legal procedure prescribed in the Prisons Act, Karnataka Prisons Act, Karnataka Prisons Rules, and Karnataka Prisons and Correctional Services Manual.The Court said the permission to have hom
